message:
fix: deduplicate parent-child dependencies and harden get_parent_id

- normalize_issue() now deduplicates dependencies by (source, target, type),
  keeping the most recent entry by created_at
- get_parent_id() uses LIMIT 1 ORDER BY instead of exactly_one_row,
  gracefully handling duplicate parent-child entries

Fixes #159

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
